old_value: {"id":"GoPromptAddOn-860","title":"Set up Python project structure with config.json","description":"Create companion/ directory, claude_monitor.py entry point, config.json with sensible Windows defaults (wow_path, account_name, poll_interval, cpu_threshold, idle_grace_seconds), and requirements.txt. Config should default wow_path to C:/Program Files (x86)/World of Warcraft/_anniversary_ and document that account_name needs updating.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:44:50Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:44:50Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-9b0","title":"Implement process detection for Claude Code using psutil","description":"Use psutil to find Claude Code processes. Claude runs as a Node.js process (CLI named 'claude'). Detect presence/absence of the process. Return 'closed' status if not found. Keep platform-specific logic behind clean abstractions for later Linux support.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:44:56Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:44:56Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-pg6","title":"Implement CPU-based idle vs working heuristic","description":"Monitor Claude process and child processes CPU usage. If above threshold (~2-5%) sustained over sample window, status is 'working'. If near-zero for several seconds, status is 'idle'. This is the core logic — must be well-tested. Write real unit tests for the heuristic including edge cases (spike then drop, gradual decline, multiple child processes).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:02Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:02Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-9hp","title":"Implement SavedVariables file writer","description":"Write ClaudeGuardDB to WoW addon SavedVariables path: \u003cwow_path\u003e/WTF/Account/\u003caccount\u003e/SavedVariables/ClaudeGuard.lua. Write atomically (temp file + rename) to prevent WoW reading partial files. Format: ClaudeGuardDB = { [\"status\"] = \"idle\", [\"lastUpdate\"] = \u003cepoch\u003e }","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:07Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:07Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-0od","title":"Implement state transition detection and grace period logic","description":"Track state transitions (working-\u003eidle, idle-\u003eworking, closed). Apply idle_grace_seconds before flipping to idle to prevent flickering. Only trigger writes/actions on actual state changes. Grace period means Claude must be idle for N continuous seconds before status becomes 'idle'.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:14Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:14Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-scj","title":"Add logging to companion script","description":"Add structured logging with configurable verbosity. Log state transitions, process detection results, file writes. Use Python's logging module. Include timestamps and log levels.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:19Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:19Z"}

{"id":"GoPromptAddOn-b1t","title":"Integration test companion script on Windows","description":"End-to-end test: run companion script with Claude Code open, verify it detects the process, correctly identifies idle vs working states, and writes valid SavedVariables file. Verify config.json defaults work on Windows.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"89503725+CollinOS@users.noreply.github.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:23Z","created_by":"Collin Osborne","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:45:23Z"}
